segments.text: Single hit into the reversed up smash for max return—that entire first stock was absolutely flawless!
segments.original_text: 一撃 そして反転上スマッシュという最大リターンを取ったところまでも全てが完璧な1ストック目でした

segments.text: At 2v2 stocks, if that up smash lands, anything could happen!
segments.original_text: 2対2ストック並べば何が起きてもおかしくない上スマッシュ

full_text: Single hit into the reversed up smash for max return—that entire first stock was absolutely flawless! At 2v2 stocks, if that up smash lands, anything could happen!

corrections.original: 判定上スマッシュという最大破格
corrections.corrected: 反転上スマッシュという最大リターン
